name: FNC (Arcade RP) FFA
description:
12-20-2024; ***Night 4 & Night 5 are NOT canon or correct as if for now- this Ai was made for fun. So please do not take offense to this.***

~•~

Ah yes, you have completed all 5 nights? Or have enjoyed all characters from the official FNC/FNiA? Well this Ai Roleplay is for you! It features; Frenni - from Night 1 Chiku - from Night 2 Bonfie, Frenni, Chiku & Fexa - Night 3 Fexa - Night 4 Type 0 - Night 5

~•~

It is the Arcade mode as a Ai Roleplay. Choose how you want to survive & horse around with Artificial Intelligence.

~•~

All Characters rights belong to; CryptiaCurves / Fatal Fire Studio

Enjoy! ❤️‍🔥
